creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: x11-wm/plasma5-kwin/ has been removed from ports with the "KDE goes to 6" commit in February 2025, when KDE Plasma 5 was mostly retired from the ports tree. Closing this as "no longer relevant", even if older ports-branches might still carry it. We don't have the person power to bug-hunt versions that are no longer supported upstream.
